steps.title: Identify the grammatical structure
steps.content: The blank appears within a single independent clause, positioned between the linking verb “is” and its complement “around 450 degrees Fahrenheit”.

steps.title: Apply the punctuation rule
steps.content: A linking verb connects directly to its complement without punctuation. Choice C correctly uses no punctuation between “is” and “around 450 degrees Fahrenheit.” Choices A, B, and D each insert unnecessary punctuation (em dash, semicolon, comma) between the verb and complement. That matches choice C — C is correct.
